name: Short-Cut Chili Con Carne
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet or slow-cooking pot with browning unit, break up the beef using a fork and cook until it is lightly browned.
2. Pour off any excess fat.
3. Add the onion, salt, chili powder, bay leaf, Worcestershire sauce, tomato sauce, and kidney beans to the pot.
4. Cover and cook on high for 2 to 3 hours.
5. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
6. Makes 6 to 7 servings.
